## Rule

- **Rule ID**: (e.g., TOKEN_IN_LOCALSTORAGE)
- **Severity**: (BLOCK / WARN / ADVISE)

## Flagged Code

```
paste the flagged code here
```

## Why This Is Safe

Explain why this code is not a security issue in your context.

## Suggested Fix

How should the rule be improved? (narrower regex, additional exclude path, etc.)

## Environment

- **ai-rsk version**: (`ai-rsk --version`)
- **Language/Framework**: (e.g., Next.js 15, Django 5, Go 1.23)
